text: Welcome aboard, guide_sam! As an event helper, you can start by checking the upcoming events calendar in #events and reading the helper checklist.
Welcome to the community, helper_alex! Thanks for stepping up as a moderator—please review the mod guidelines in #mod-resources.
Welcome, mentor_lina! We're excited to have you as a mentor—please introduce yourself in #mentors and review the mentoring guidelines in the pinned messages.
